summary: The packaged reproduction bundle cloned upstream commit `5eb316c12c2a2eff9cbcc595611bf33c13be773f`, started the UDR SBI server, and confirmed that an unauthenticated `POST /nudr-dr/v2/subscription-data/subs-to-notify` request succeeds with `201 Created`.
expected_security_impact: An unauthenticated caller can perform a state-changing `/nudr-dr` operation and receive `201 Created`, demonstrating fail-open authorization on the SBI surface.
actual_observed_result: Running `./reproduction/run.sh` built the Docker bundle, cloned the pinned upstream commit, issued the unauthenticated subscription create request, observed a `201` response in the server log, and emitted `EVOHUNT_FAIL_OPEN_AUTH_CONFIRMED`.
verification_method: The reproduction helper starts the vulnerable server locally, sends the unauthenticated request over HTTP, asserts that the response status is `201 Created`, checks that one subscription was stored, and prints a success marker only if all checks pass.
evidence_produced_by_run: UDR server log line for `POST /nudr-dr/v2/subscription-data/subs-to-notify` with status `201`.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit or ref, and mounts that checkout into the container.
